build_systems.name: Tauri 2
build_systems.notes: Bundles frontend (Vite), Rust backend, sidecar dist, and agent-sources as app resources. Identifier: com.vibedata.skill-builder. CSP allows Anthropic API + GitHub API. Dev port: DEV_PORT (default 1420), HMR on DEV_PORT+1.

build_systems.name: Vite 7
build_systems.notes: React + Tailwind plugin. Path alias `@/` → `./src/`. E2E mock path alias via TAURI_E2E env var.

build_systems.name: esbuild (sidecar)
build_systems.notes: Compiles TypeScript sidecar to `app/sidecar/dist/` for Tauri bundling. No hot-reload — restart `npm run dev` after editing sidecar source.

build_systems.name: GitHub Actions
build_systems.notes: ci.yml: typecheck + unit tests (Node 22) + cargo test + clippy + docs build gate. docs.yml: VitePress build + GitHub Pages deploy. release.yml: multi-platform Tauri build + sign + publish.

test_frameworks.name: Promptfoo
test_frameworks.scope: Agent smoke tests (live API calls — manual only, do not run autonomously)

applications.name: Skill Builder Desktop
applications.description: Multi-agent workflow for creating domain-specific Claude skills. React frontend + Rust backend + Node.js agent sidecar.

frontend_components.description: Reusable UI components. Sub-directories: agent-items/ (display item renderers: base, error, output, result, subagent, thinking, tool), layout/ (app-layout, header, sidebar), refine/ (chat panel, chat input, preview panel, git patch view, skill picker), settings/ (general, github, marketplace, sdk, advanced sections), ui/ (shadcn/ui primitives). Flat components include skill cards, dialogs (delete, import, github, skill, feedback, reset, transition-gate), clarifications-editor, workflow-step-complete, agent panels, and more.

frontend_pages.description: Page-level route components: dashboard, workflow, settings, refine, usage, test

frontend_stores.description: Zustand state stores: agent, auth, imported-skills, refine, settings, skill, test, usage, workflow

frontend_hooks.description: Custom React hooks: agent streaming, workflow state machine, workflow session/persistence/autosave, test orchestration, settings form, scope blocking, marketplace registries, node validation, leave guard

frontend_lib.description: Utilities and shared types: tauri.ts (typed Tauri command wrappers), types.ts (shared TS types), agent-events.ts (frontend AgentEvent types), display-types.ts (DisplayItem types), agent-results.ts (result parsing), eval-parser.ts (eval output parsing), models.ts (model list), workflow-steps.ts + workflow-step-configs.ts (step definitions), clarifications-types.ts, path-utils.ts, app-log.ts, help-urls.ts, toast.ts, utils.ts

rust_commands.description: Tauri command handlers. Flat files: agent, workspace, settings, usage, github_auth, skill_test, clarification, feedback, files, git, lifecycle, node, sidecar_lifecycle, workflow_lifecycle, test_utils. Sub-module directories: workflow/ (step_config, deploy, claude_md, output_format, packaging, runtime, evaluation, tests), imported_skills/ (frontmatter, helpers, bundled, lifecycle, listing, upload), github_import/ (http, url, catalog, import, commands), skill/ (crud, metadata, suggestions, tests), refine/ (content, diff, output, protocol, tests)

rust_db.description: SQLite schema, migrations (code-only), and query helpers. Sub-modules: mod.rs (Db struct, init_db, pub use re-exports, all tests), migrations.rs (NUMBERED_MIGRATIONS + migration functions), skills.rs (skill CRUD/workflow runs/steps/tags), usage.rs (persist_agent_run/usage queries), settings.rs (read/write settings), imported_skills.rs (imported skill CRUD/hash tracking), locks.rs (skill locks/check_pid_alive), workflow.rs (workflow sessions).

rust_agents.description: Agent runtime. Files: sidecar_pool.rs (persistent sidecar lifecycle, stream dispatch, multi-turn sessions), events.rs (routes agent_event subtypes, persists run_result, emits Tauri frontend events), sidecar.rs (sidecar process spawning), sidecar_path.rs (resolves sidecar binary path), node_resolver.rs (Node.js binary resolution with platform-specific logic).

sidecar_runner.description: Entry point: reads stdin JSON config, calls SDK query(), streams JSONL events to stdout

sidecar_events.description: Canonical AgentEvent type definitions — service boundary contract between sidecar and Rust

sidecar_core.description: Supporting sidecar modules: persistent-mode.ts (message demultiplexer, routes one-shot vs streaming requests), run-agent.ts (executes a single agent request), stream-session.ts (async generator push pattern for multi-turn streaming), message-processor.ts (transforms SDK messages into DisplayItems and AgentEvents), message-classifier.ts (classifies SDK message types), run-metadata-accumulator.ts (accumulates run-level metadata), tool-summaries.ts (context-aware tool call summaries), display-types.ts (DisplayItem types), config.ts + options.ts (SDK config builders), error-labels.ts (user-facing error strings), research-tools.ts (research tool definitions), shutdown.ts (graceful shutdown handler)

sidecar_mock.description: Mock mode: replays bundled templates with no API calls. Activated via MOCK_AGENTS=true.

agent_prompts.description: Flat directory of .md agent prompts: answer-evaluator, confirm-decisions, detailed-research, eval-skill, generate-skill, refine-skill, research-orchestrator, validate-quality, validate-skill

workspace_instructions.description: Agent workspace instructions deployed at startup. CLAUDE.md (full instructions → workspace .claude/CLAUDE.md), CLAUDE-MINIMAL.md (lightweight variant), prompts/ (shared prompt fragments injected into workspace)

rust_reconciliation.description: Startup DB↔filesystem reconciliation state machine. mod.rs (entry point: reconcile_on_startup, resolve_orphan, preview), skill_builder.rs (skill-builder skill reconciliation scenarios), marketplace.rs (marketplace skill reconciliation), tests.rs (scenario coverage tests). See docs/design/startup-recon/ for full scenario matrix.

rust_types.description: Shared Rust types split by domain. mod.rs (re-exports), settings.rs (AppSettings, MarketplaceRegistry), github.rs (GitHubUser, DeviceFlowResponse), workflow.rs (WorkflowRunRow, StepConfig, WorkflowStateResponse), skill.rs (SkillSummary, DiscoveredSkill), usage.rs (UsageSummary, AgentRunRecord), refine.rs (refine session types), startup.rs (ReconciliationResult, startup types).

rust_support.description: Top-level Rust support modules (not commands or DB): cleanup.rs (future-step artifact cleanup), fs_validation.rs (detect_furthest_step, has_skill_output, path validation helpers), git.rs (git commit/init helpers for skill output repos), logging.rs (structured logging setup, log-level management).

frontend_test_utils.description: Frontend test infrastructure: setup.ts (global Vitest setup), fixtures.ts (shared test data factories), mocks/ (Tauri invoke mocks, store mocks, router mocks used across unit and component tests).

key_directories.app/src/: Frontend React/TypeScript runtime (components, pages, stores, hooks, lib, styles, test, router)
key_directories.app/src/styles/: Global CSS: globals.css defines Tailwind 4 base, AD brand CSS variables (--color-seafoam, --color-pacific, --color-ocean), dark-mode tokens. Source of truth for all design tokens — never use raw Tailwind palette classes.
key_directories.app/src/test/: Frontend test infrastructure: setup.ts (Vitest global setup), fixtures.ts (test data factories), mocks/ (Tauri invoke mocks, store mocks, router mocks). Distinguished from app/src/__tests__/ which contains the actual test files.
key_directories.app/src/__tests__/: Frontend unit/integration tests, mirroring src/ structure: components/, guards/, hooks/, lib/, pages/, stores/
key_directories.app/src-tauri/src/: Rust backend runtime (Tauri commands, DB, agents, types, reconciliation, support modules)
key_directories.app/sidecar/: Node.js/TypeScript agent sidecar (JSONL protocol, SDK invocation, mock mode)
key_directories.app/sidecar/__tests__/: Sidecar unit tests (one test file per sidecar module)
key_directories.app/e2e/: Playwright E2E tests. Sub-directories: dashboard, workflow, refine, settings, usage, skill-tester, skills-library, integration, desktop-smoke, fixtures, helpers, setup
key_directories.agent-sources/agents/: Agent prompt .md files — flat directory, structurally validated by test:agents:structural
key_directories.agent-sources/workspace/: Workspace agent instructions: CLAUDE.md (full), CLAUDE-MINIMAL.md (lightweight), prompts/ (shared fragments). Deployed to workspace .claude/ at app startup.
key_directories.docs/design/: Architecture decision records and design specs: agent-specs, backend-design, startup-recon, workflow-state, clarifications-rendering, skill-tester, skills-marketplace, and more. Primary reference for non-obvious design decisions.
key_directories.docs/user-guide/: VitePress user documentation, deployed via docs.yml to GitHub Pages
key_directories.docs/references/: Vendored external reference docs (e.g. Anthropic API snapshots)
key_directories..claude/rules/: Shared agent rules (agent-agnostic, detailed policy). Referenced from AGENTS.md.
key_directories..claude/skills/: Workflow playbooks for Claude Code CLI skills

dependencies_internal.rust → sidecar: Node.js child process, stdin/stdout JSONL protocol
dependencies_internal.frontend → sidecar_events: Typed via agent-events.ts contract, received as Tauri events

commands.install: cd app && npm install && npm run sidecar:build
commands.dev_mock: cd app && MOCK_AGENTS=true npm run dev
commands.test_agents_smoke: cd app && npm run test:agents:smoke  # MANUAL ONLY — makes live API calls

conventions.rust: Standard Rust conventions, clippy enforced. Every Tauri command logs info! on entry, error! on failure.
conventions.commits: Granular — one concern per commit. Stage specific files (`git add <file>`, not `git add .`).
conventions.linear_project: All issues for this repo go under Skill Builder
conventions.file_size_and_responsibility: Keep files focused on one concern. Split when a file exceeds ~300 lines (frontend TS/TSX) or ~400 lines (Rust command file). Rust: extract sub-module directories when a command group combines API surface, orchestration, persistence, and filesystem ops. Frontend: extract sub-components, custom hooks, or lib utilities rather than growing a component or page inline.
conventions.no_monoliths: A Tauri command file should define commands and delegate to helpers — not own query logic, filesystem ops, and business rules simultaneously. A React component should render — not own a state machine, data fetching, and complex transformations inline. When in doubt, split.

key_references.startup_recon_design: docs/design/startup-recon/ — reconciliation scenario matrix (scenarios 1–12), used by reconciliation/
key_references.frontend_rules: .claude/rules/frontend-design.md — AD brand, component constraints, state indicators
key_references.rust_rules: .claude/rules/rust-backend.md — command conventions, error types, Rust testing
key_references.db_change_protocol: .claude/rules/db-schema-change.md — mandatory protocol for any schema, migration, or persistence change
key_references.windows_compat: .claude/rules/windows-compat.md — path separators, CRLF, env-var syntax, Rust toolchain. Read before writing path assertions, regex, package.json scripts, or CI config.
key_references.logging_policy: .claude/rules/logging-policy.md — log levels, sensitive data redaction, structured logging, correlation IDs
key_references.test_manifest: TEST_MANIFEST.md — Rust command → E2E tag mappings, shared infra blast radius, cross-boundary format compliance. Read before choosing tests for Rust or cross-layer changes.

notes_for_agents.startup: Read this file before exploring code. It is the primary startup context for structure, entrypoints, modules, and commands. Skip repo-wide rediscovery if it covers your task.
notes_for_agents.sidecar_hot_reload: Sidecar has NO hot-reload. Restart `npm run dev` after editing app/sidecar/ files.
notes_for_agents.sdk_limitations: @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk does NOT support TeamCreate, TaskCreate, SendMessage. Use the Task tool for sub-agents. Multiple Task calls in the same turn run in parallel.
notes_for_agents.test_autonomy: Only `test:agents:structural` may be run autonomously — no API calls. Never run `test:agents:smoke` autonomously.
notes_for_agents.db_location: Database is at Tauri app_data_dir()/skill-builder.db. macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/com.vibedata.skill-builder/skill-builder.db
notes_for_agents.migrations: DB migrations are code-only in db/migrations.rs NUMBERED_MIGRATIONS constant — no separate migration files directory.
notes_for_agents.workspace_path: Workspace: <app_local_data_dir>/workspace (not user-configurable). Resolved from Tauri app_local_data_dir() by resolve_workspace_path() in commands/workspace.rs. Legacy ~/.vibedata/ path is cleaned up automatically on startup.
notes_for_agents.mock_mode: MOCK_AGENTS=true replays bundled templates in app/sidecar/mock-templates/ with no API calls.
notes_for_agents.agent_tests_changed: When agents/*.md or agent-sources/workspace/** changes, run `cd app && npm run test:agents:structural` before reporting completion.
notes_for_agents.pre_commit_checks: Before committing: `markdownlint <file>` for .md files · `cd app && npx tsc --noEmit` · `cargo check --manifest-path app/src-tauri/Cargo.toml` · `bash app/scripts/lint-agent-docs.sh` when editing AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .claude/rules/, or .claude/skills/.
notes_for_agents.test_selection: For Rust or cross-layer changes, read TEST_MANIFEST.md to find the correct cargo filter and E2E tag before running tests. Frontend test selection is handled automatically by `vitest --changed`.
notes_for_agents.path_safety: All filesystem operations on user-supplied skill names must call validate_skill_name() and use fs::canonicalize + starts_with before any remove_dir_all or rename. See commands/skill/crud.rs delete_skill_inner for the canonical pattern.
notes_for_agents.update_repo_map: Refresh this file whenever you change architecture, entrypoints, commands, modules, or package structure.
